mapper.sql: id, dict_code, dict_name, usage_scene, status, sort_no, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_at
id, dict_code, item_value, item_label, parent_value, sort_no, enabled, extra_json, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from sys_dict_type
and (dict_code like #{keywordLike} or dict_name like #{keywordLike} or usage_scene like #{keywordLike})
and status = #{status}
order by sort_no asc, updated_at desc
mapper.update: update sys_dict_type set dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_name = #{dictName}, usage_scene = #{usageScene}, status = #{status}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_dict_item where dict_code = #{dictCode}
mapper.update: update sys_dict_item set dict_code = #{dictCode}, item_value = #{itemValue}, item_label = #{itemLabel}, parent_value = #{parentValue}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, enabled = #{enabled}, extra_json = #{extraJson}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
